mapper.insert: MERGE INTO USER_ACTIVITY_LOG L USING ( SELECT #{member_id} as m_id, #{action_type} as a_type, #{content_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC} as c_id, #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} as kw FROM DUAL ) T ON ( L.MEMBER_ID = T.m_id AND L.ACTION_TYPE = T.a_type AND (L.CONTENT_ID = T.c_id OR (L.CONTENT_ID IS NULL AND T.c_id IS NULL)) AND (L.KEYWORD = T.kw OR (L.KEYWORD IS NULL AND T.kw IS NULL)) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CREATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (LOG_ID, MEMBER_ID, ACTION_TYPE, CONTENT_ID, KEYWORD, CREATED_AT) VALUES (USER_ACTIVITY_LOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, T.m_id, T.a_type, T.c_id, T.kw, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID, MEMBER_ID, ACTION_TYPE, CONTENT_ID, KEYWORD, CREATED_AT, TITLE FROM ( SELECT L.*, F.TITLE FROM USER_ACTIVITY_LOG L LEFT JOIN FESTIVAL_INFO F ON L.CONTENT_ID = F.CONTENT_ID WHERE L.MEMBER_ID = #{member_id} ORDER BY L.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id} AND ACTION_TYPE = 'ATTENDANCE' AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
